title: Dynamical lattice regulators for QFT
summary: Rotationally invariant dynamical lattices for Euclidean quantum field theories, with attention to continuum symmetries and computable regularization.

title: Nudging and data assimilation for fluids
summary: Projectional and data-assimilation nudging for fluid equations, motivated by stability, reconstruction, and reduced observation.

title: Exact ReLU realizations of refinement schemes
summary: Exact realization of homogeneous curve refinement by ReLU networks, including loop controllers and frame or atlas viewpoints.

title: Numerical analysis and geometric discretization
summary: Adaptive methods, finite element exterior calculus, discrete exterior calculus, and structure-preserving approximation of differential operators.

title: PDE, conformal geometry, and general relativity
summary: Elliptic and geometric PDE, scalar and boundary mean curvature problems, and the Einstein constraint equations.

title: Hamiltonian lattice gauge theory and quantum simulation
summary: Computational explorations around Hamiltonian lattice gauge theory, quantum simulation, and mathematical physics pedagogy.

title: Mathematical physics notes and educational projects
summary: Expository notes and teaching projects around QFT, mathematical physics, and computational illustrations.
